The '''Chandrilan House''' was a worldwide governing body on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]. It was a democratic body. [[Jovive Centi]] was a leading figure in the Chandrilan House.<ref name="CatCW" />

The system of government used on Chandrila was a representative [[Democracy/Legends|democracy]].<ref name="Strongholds">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref>

The Chandrilan government met in a building also known as the [[Chandrilan House (location)|Chandrilan House]].<ref name="Strongholds" />
{{Stub}}
